title: Sericocalyx phyllostachyus
taxonomy: Sericocalyx phyllostachyus is a species within the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant, which means it has a unique relationship with its host plant for nutrient acquisition. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its distinctive appearance and growth habits. Sericocalyx phyllostachyus is also commonly referred to by its synonym, parent plant Bartsia phyllostachya. Further research is needed to confirm the specific classification of this species.
